title: Evangelion 20 North American Screening Dates
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 North American Screening Dates             Quote Post by soundwaveCA » Fri Dec 10, 2010 6:14 pm http://www.cineplex.com/Movies/MovieDetails/Evangelion-2-0-You-Can-Not-Advance.aspx Looks like Cineplex is having a 1 day screening of Eva 2.0 at theaters across Canada on Jan 20 2011 at 7pm. Check link above for a theater near you, should just type in your postal code for the nearest one. As far as I can tell it's playing in all major cities so mark your calenders.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Fri Dec 10, 2010 6:37 pm This is......the MOST AWESOME THING I HAVE HEARD in quite sometime! I'm going to mark this date firmly on my calendar. Oh yeah!!! And this time i'm going to avoid the shitty ass theatre location that spoiled my Evangelion 1.0 viewing last year. Bastards.....

[]:             Quote Post by RMZX » Fri Dec 10, 2010 7:54 pm Canada gets all the good things. When 1.0 came out in the US we got ripped off by having like, two US Showings, both in CALIFORNIA.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri Dec 10, 2010 8:42 pm RMZX wrote: Canada gets all the good things. When 1.0 came out in the US we got ripped off by having like, two US Showings, both in CALIFORNIA.

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Fri Dec 10, 2010 9:23 pm i wish i didn't have final exams that week or I would totally drive to the city to see that!!

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Fri Dec 10, 2010 11:22 pm RMZX wrote: Canada gets all the good things. When 1.0 came out in the US we got ripped off by having like, two US Showings, both in CALIFORNIA.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Dec 11, 2010 12:02 am Well the U.S. and Canada share a lot of release dates. So who knows, January 21st is a Friday. That would be a good date for Evangelion 2.0's rumored U.S. theatrical release.

[]:             Quote Post by unit450 » Sat Dec 11, 2010 5:49 pm Woohoo! Confirmed my hometown is getting it for that night, but I still wish I lived in the Toronto area. Went to the Colossus when I heard about the restaurants inside, that was just heavenly enjoying my Eva with some good ol' KFC. Gonna be a wonderful though, and just a few days after my birthday!

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Sat Dec 11, 2010 9:08 pm Awesome, thanks for the heads up. I've never gotten the chance to see anime in the theatre before (excluding pokemon...).

[]:             Quote Post by beaverteeth92 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 10:20 am So I take it this is going to be subbed?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Dec 12, 2010 4:41 pm beaverteeth92 wrote: So I take it this is going to be subbed?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Dec 13, 2010 7:43 am If its 2.0 they're screening, then its definitely subbed.

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Mon Dec 13, 2010 11:40 am I saw a pamplet for 1.0 a while back, and it listed dub names for the cast (so I didn't see it), this one lists the Japanese names, so I assume it'll be in Japanese.

[]:             Quote Post by ERNIEMEX » Tue Dec 14, 2010 11:49 pm i seriously hope that if there is a release date for screenings in the U.S. that the movie will be dubbed. <3

[]: Evangelion 2.0 North American Screening Dates             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Wed Dec 15, 2010 11:13 am http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/press-release/2010-12-15/evangelion/2.0-you-can-not-advance-attacks-north-america Sorry if there's a thread for this already/if it's been stated in a different thread (if so please feel free to merge it or something) but page 2 isn't loading because my internet is great . Oddly they used the same press release title as their "It's coming in January" press release. Also, I forgot to add. This will be dubbed. Not subbed. This isn't a film festival. It's a theatrical run by Funimation as well as two other companies, Funi has been doing theatrical runs, dubbed, for some time now, not once have they done a subbed run. Just clearing that up if anyone decides to ask.

[]: This is all Hatsumi92's fault. >:[             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Dec 15, 2010 11:22 am Dammit! Nothing within driving distance of me. I knew this would happen.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Dec 15, 2010 11:22 am If it were subtitled, I would consider going.

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Wed Dec 15, 2010 11:25 am Hey whats up I'm 1.0's poster--- OH WAIT. But it honestly suits 2.0 more than 1.0, it's more actiony (that's a word now), just like the 2.0 movie.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Dec 15, 2010 11:35 am if I can go take a one day trip to San Diego, Los Angeles or San Francisco, I would go

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Wed Dec 15, 2010 1:19 pm Shit, it is within driving distance for me. The problem is that I will have to work on those days : /
